description: [ELON] Add Shopify integration card to Settings > Integrations page. Show connection status, shop domain (if connected), last sync timestamp, and orders synced count. Add 'Connect Shopify' button that redirects to /api/shopify/install. Add 'Disconnect' button (admin-only) that revokes access token and clears shopify_credentials. Add 'Sync Now' button (admin-only) that calls POST /api/shopify/sync-now and shows progress toast.
successCriteria: Integrations page displays Shopify connection status
Connect button redirects to Shopify OAuth flow
Disconnect button clears credentials and updates UI
Sync Now button triggers sync and shows success/error toast
Non-admin users cannot see Disconnect or Sync Now buttons
